level_signals: Works directly with leaders across Plaid on company's most important problems
Meaningful time in consulting as well as direct operating roles

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of total experience, with meaningful time in consulting as well as direct operating roles (BizOps, Strategy & Ops, Finance, Chief of Staff, etc.
A track record of independently identifying problems and driving them to outcomes with limited top-down direction
High agency, sense of ownership, and willingness to roll up your sleeves
Ability to build relationships at all levels and drive cross-functional teams to action
Strong analytical and structured-thinking skills; comfort translating ambiguity into frameworks, plans, and decisions
Use AI tools and agents as a default part of how you work — not as an experiment, but as a force multiplier

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with AI tools and agents to accelerate workflows is a plus
Knowledge of SQL and Tableau preferred
Experience in fintech, payments, or high-growth SaaS preferred

scope.surface: Company-wide strategic initiatives, cross-functional problem solving at the seams of multiple teams or functions
primary_metrics_inferred: Outcomes delivered on high-priority, unowned problems
cross_functional_partners: All business functions (strategy, GTM, operations, product, finance)
core_responsibilities: Work directly with leaders across Plaid on the company's most important and least-defined problems, particularly those at the seams of multiple teams or functions
Identify unowned, high-leverage opportunities across the business and driving them to clean outcomes
Operate across a wide aperture (strategy, GTM, operations, product, etc.) without being boxed into a single lane
Lead (directly or indirectly) high performing teams
Use AI tools and agents as a default part of how you work — not as an experiment, but as a force multiplier

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as additional compensation form

green_flags: High-visibility role working directly with company leaders on most important problems
Explicitly encourages applicants whose experience doesn't fully match the JD
Broad aperture role — not boxed into a single lane
red_flags: Location/work arrangement not specified in the JD body — unclear if remote, hybrid, or onsite
Role title 'Strategic Initiatives' is vague and does not clearly indicate level or function
AI tools listed as both a must-have (responsibilities) and a nice-to-have (qualifications) — creates ambiguity about how hard this requirement is

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years required, management responsibility, and scope of role)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Pay is based on factors such as... location')
ambiguities: AI tools appear in both the Responsibilities section (as a hard expectation) and the Qualifications section as 'a plus' — treated as hard in must_haves per responsibility framing, and also captured in nice_to_haves per qualification framing.

Location/work arrangement is not specified in the JD; company offices are listed generically (San Francisco, New York, Washington D.C., London, Amsterdam) but it is unclear which apply to this role or whether remote is permitted.

Role title 'Strategic Initiatives' could map to BizOps / Strategy & Ops, Chief of Staff, or a senior individual contributor function — classified as BizOps / Strategy & Ops with Chief of Staff as secondary.
